title: Consumer Spending in China Continues to Improve, But Furniture Sales Remain in Contraction Search for all messages with label Inbox
section_path: Consumer Spending in China Continues to Improve, But Furniture Sales Remain in Contraction Search for all messages with label Inbox
section_path_text: Consumer Spending in China Continues to Improve, But Furniture Sales Remain in Contraction Search for all messages with label Inbox
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
China's retail sales in November grew year-on-year by 10.1%. This has again marked the highest retail sales growth seen since May and is of course well above November's 0.5% decline in inflation. China's retail sales growth has now come in higher than inflation during each of the last eleven months.
